description_long: This refrigerator features a classic, boxy design with rounded edges and a single front door that opens to reveal a spacious interior. The exterior is primarily a smooth, light gray color with a slightly darker trim around the door and base. The interior includes two wire shelves and a small freezer compartment at the top, all finished in a light beige color. The back of the refrigerator displays a black panel with horizontal slats, a visible power rating label, and exposed mechanical components. A prominent, protruding handle is mounted on the front door, and a small metallic brand logo is affixed above it. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard, glossy finish typical of metal appliances.
description: A classic, light gray refrigerator with a rounded, single-door design, wire shelves inside, and a prominent handle. The back features a black vented panel and exposed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, rounded exterior and the open door revealing the light beige interior.
description_view_1: Front view with the door fully open, displaying the wire shelves and freezer compartment inside.
description_view_2: Angled rear-side view highlighting the closed door, handle, and metallic brand logo.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the black vented panel, power label, and exposed mechanical components.
attribute_brand_logo: A small metallic logo is visible on the front door, above the handle, rectangular in shape and silver in color.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding, horizontal handle mounted on the front door, slightly curved for grip.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Horizontal slats on the black rear panel, covering the lower half.
